mapper.select: SELECT c.collection_id, c.po_id, po.po_code, c.client_id, c.collection_sales_amount, c.collection_status, c.collection_completed_date, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM collections c JOIN purchase_orders po ON c.po_id = po.po_id WHERE c.collection_id = #{id}

SELECT c.collection_id, c.po_id, po.po_code, c.client_id, c.collection_sales_amount, c.collection_status, c.collection_completed_date, c.created_at, c.updated_at FROM collections c JOIN purchase_orders po ON c.po_id = po.po_id
